ATM-er（The Giver）

You think I’m rich?

Dimension Pattern: HHH-HHM-HHH-HMH-MHL
You are one of the rarest personalities in the world. If there is a financial mystery here, it is that you are not necessarily “giving money” so much as constantly paying with time, energy, patience, and peace of mind. Like an old but sturdy ATM, you absorb other people’s anxiety and return one thing in exchange: “Don’t worry, I’ve got it.” Your life is one long, unglamorous solo-payment performance.

Think you might be {{code}}? Take the test and find out!

Start SBTI Test
